title: Dashboard / Guests
excerpt: As a Standared User, can I invite guests to view Dashboards?

posts.author: ron_w (RW)
posts.cookedHtml: As a Standared User, can I invite guests to view Dashboards?

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ron_w

As long as that Guest is also invited to the boards that connect to the Dashboard, they will be able to view the information on the Dashboard

If you invite a Guest to a Dashboard but not any of the boards attached to the Dashboard, they won’t be able to see any information as it will be “secret”.

To see what you can and cannot do as a guest, check out this article: How to Get Started as a Guest

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna
